@article{sinclair2022insights,
    author={Sinclair, Venayagomoorthy, Gates},
  	title={Some Insights into Flow Over Sharp-Crested Weirs},
  	journal={Journal of Irrigation and Drainage Engineering},
  	volume={148},
  	number={6},
  	month={Jan},
  	year={2022}
    doi = {10.1061/(ASCE)IR.1943-4774.0001652}
}

@misc{maldonado2004theory,
  author = {Sergio Maldonado},
  title = {Theory of Weirs},
  year = {2004},
  school = {University of Southhampton}
  note = {[class notes for CENV3066]},
  url = {https://sergio-maldonado.github.io/teaching.html}
}


@techreport{WMM2001USBR,
  title = {USBR Water Measurement Manual},
  institution = {US Bureau of Reclamation},
  year = {2001},
  url = {https://www.usbr.gov/tsc/techreferences/mands/wmm/}
}

@mastersthesis{Sinclair2021FlowSharpCrested,
  title        = {New Insight into Flow Over Sharp-Crested and Pivot Weirs using Computation Fluid Dynamics},
  author       = {Joseph Sinclair},
  year         = {2021},
  month        = {Summer},
  address      = {Fort Collins, CO},
  note         = {Available at https://github.com/smithrockmaker/CentralOregonWater/blob/main/Docs/Sinclair_colostate_0053N_16674.pdf},

  type         = {Master's thesis}
}
